article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: Correctly classifies a clearly Right-leaning opinion piece with well-calibrated high confidence and no attribution violations, though evidence is somewhat general rather than quoting specific phrases from the author's prose.
